data.name: RedundantAllowNullRuleDescription
data.value: AllowNull is redundant on nullable properties because generated Fluentify extensions already allow null assignments for nullable properties.

data.name: RedundantAllowNullRuleMessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' is nullable, making the usage of the AllowNull attribute redundant.

data.name: RedundantAllowNullRuleTitle
data.value: AllowNull is redundant for nullable properties

data.name: RedundantDisallowNullRuleDescription
data.value: DisallowNull is redundant on non-nullable properties because generated Fluentify extensions already reject null assignments for non-nullable properties.

data.name: RedundantDisallowNullRuleMessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' is not nullable, making the usage of the DisallowNull attribute redundant.

data.name: RedundantDisallowNullRuleTitle
data.value: DisallowNull is redundant for non-nullable properties

data.name: RedundantMaybeNullRuleDescription
data.value: MaybeNull is redundant on nullable properties because generated Fluentify extensions already allow null assignments for nullable properties.

data.name: RedundantMaybeNullRuleMessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' is nullable, making the usage of the MaybeNull attribute redundant.

data.name: RedundantMaybeNullRuleTitle
data.value: MaybeNull is redundant for nullable properties
